experiment_9.Task: Build a reusable Galaxy tabular ML workflow for immunotherapy response prediction with internal and external validation.
experiment_9.Prompt: I want a reusable Galaxy machine-learning workflow for these immunotherapy response cohorts. Use the attached local Chowell train/test files plus the extra cohort locations in the manifest, build a sensible workflow, evaluate it on the Chowell test cohort and the MSK1 cohort, and report the two accuracies along with how you tuned the model.
